insights.title: Revenue is declining 16.8% over last 2 weeks
insights.detail: If current trend continues, revenue may drop ~33.7% next month

insights.title: Abnormal revenue drop detected on 2026-03-25
insights.detail: Revenue fell to ₹117,637 — significantly below normal. Both Isolation Forest and Z-score models flagged this.

insights.title: Top 6 products drive 72.3% of revenue
insights.detail: Smart Watch and Running Shoes alone account for the majority of sales. High concentration risk.

insights.title: Electronics has the lowest conversion rate (7.09%)
insights.detail: Compared to Books at 7.32%, Electronics is significantly underperforming. Review pricing and product listings.

insights.title: 14 products identified as underperformers by ML clustering
insights.detail: K-Means segmentation identified Denim Jacket, Webcam, Hoodie as low-revenue, low-conversion products. Consider discontinuing or promoting.

summary.narrative: Sales grew 2.2% with the strongest contribution from Electronics and Smart Watch in the last 14 days.

recommendations.action: Launch a targeted promotional campaign immediately
recommendations.rationale: Revenue has declined 16.8% — passive monitoring will allow compounding decline.
recommendations.expected_impact: Arrest decline; stabilize revenue within 7 days

recommendations.action: Diversify product portfolio to reduce concentration risk
recommendations.rationale: Over-reliance on a few products creates fragility. One product issue can tank overall performance.

recommendations.action: Review and consider removing underperforming SKUs
recommendations.rationale: Low revenue and low conversion — these products consume listing real estate without contributing meaningfully.

decision_score.explanation: Business Health Score: 51/100 — At Risk. Driven by declining revenue trend (-16.8%), multiple anomalies detected
